title: Tank-farm facility mimic (UI)
description: Golden SCADA mimic journey for a facility overview.
prompt: Create a tank-farm facility mimic with tank levels and valve positions, plus a facility overview dashboard an operator can open in Operator mode.
uiJourney: Explorer → Mimic editor → Dashboard builder → Operator
humanSteps: In Explorer, create or select tank and valve objects with level/position variables.
Open Mimic; draw tanks and valves; bind fill and position to variables; save.
Open Dashboard; add overview widgets for the same tags; save.
Switch to Operator mode and open the facility overview screen.
